title: This AI startup is building software infrastructure that lets you run AI ...

This AI startup is building software infrastructure that lets you run AI models locally on any device. Founder pitches Brycent at Y Combinator demo day.
Startup - Runanywhere: The default way of running on-device AI at Scale
Edge AI is inevitable, but shipping it is painful: every device class behaves differently, runtimes vary, models are huge, and performance collapses under memory/power constraints. RunAnywhere turns that into an enterprise-ready workflow: one SDK to run models on-device, plus a control plane to manage models, enforce policies, and measure outcomes across thousands of devices.
roshanoronha
1w
I am new to this. Can someone explain to me how different is this from downloading local models onto your systems and running them. Also won’t that take too much RAM to execute? Your system would need to be stackedd, right?
Like Reply
shreyoxo
1w
This won't work long term better to build something from scratch and protect it using TEE
Like Reply
theinternetvc
1w
Wow, this is one of the 173947839034 startups working on it - great potential
Like Reply
terryjohnpaul20
2w
Ollama already does that I guess
Like Reply
iammahdali
2w
Does YC help you move into the USA if you are selected?
Like Reply
owenmurphy2022
2w
not giving your data away? I am sure most these downloaded models have a secret network call to send to their servers when you use it, you just can't see it unless you search network packets. This experiment was done with deepseek and confirmed. I wouldn't put it past american companies doing th same. American and China really don't fall that far from the tree in terms of the AI race when you really think about it...
Like Reply
liamjamesparker
2w
If it has to be an IoT device then its not running locally maybe he can explain better
Like Reply
snehit_vaddi
3w
More like Pied Piper AI??
Like Reply
_lion_king_933
4w
👏👏
Like Reply
ripeey
4w
What about google edge galary?
Like Reply
_sbaksi_
4w
Nah nah I don’t take that 16% man that impossible
Like Reply

4w
You doing great
Like Reply

4w
